rulings.Case Title: ENVIRONMENTAL VS CA DEPT OF PESTICIDE
rulings.Rulings: GRANT WRIT. DEPARTMENT OF PESTICIDE REGULATION ABUSED DISCRETION BY FAILING TO COMPLY WITH FOOD AND AGRICULTURE CODE 11454.2 BY FAILING TO CONSULT WITH DEPARTMENT OF FOOD AND AGRICULTURE AND IN OTHER RESPECTS. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: VANMAN VS CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE FEHA NO WRONGFUL ACTS DURING LIMITATIONS PERIOD AND CONTINUING VIOLATION DOES NOT APPLY. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO TITLE VII, NO EEOC CHARGE FILED. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO UNRUH, UNRUH DOES NOT APPLY TO EMPLOYMENT DISCRIMINATION. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE AND 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. CLAIMS ARE TIME BARRED BY PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO FILE SUIT WITHIN TWO YEARS OF DENIAL OF CLAIM. (CW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Mtn For Order Consolidating Actions
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Consolidate: DENY. (CW)

1st cause of action Bad Faith Breach of Oral and Written Agreements: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to clarify elements of contract and breach etc with respect to each landlord. 2nd cause of action Bad Faith Breach of Fiduciary Duty: SUSTAIN without leave to amend. 3rd cause of action Breach of Warranty of "Tenantability" (contract): SUSTAIN without leave to amend doctrine does not apply to commercial leases. 4th cause of action Breach of Warranty of "Tenantability" (tort): SUSTAIN without leave to amend doctrine does not apply to commercial leases. 5th cause of action Negligent Maintenance of Property: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to clarify existence of duty, breach, causation and damages as to each landlord 6th cause of action Willfully Negligent Failure to repair and maintain elevators: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to clarify existence of duty, breach, causation and damages as to each landlord 7th cause of action Promise without Intent to Perform: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to allege fraud with requisite specificity, especially as to corporate defendants, authority of speakers to make representations, etc. 8th cause of action Breach of Statutory Duty under Civil?1955: SUSTAIN without leave to amend. 9th cause of action Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress: SUSTAIN without leave to amend. Paragraph 40 for Punitive Damages: GRANT without leave to amend. Paragraph 66 for Punitive Damages: Moot because demurrer sustained without leave. Paragraph 82 for Punitive Damages: GRANT without leave to amend. Paragraph D and E in Prayer for Punitive Damages: GRANT without leave to amend. (CW)
